seo.title: SvelteKit implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping SvelteKit projects safely.

content.intro: A technical checklist for deploying SvelteKit applications to production, ensuring performance, security, and type safety across edge and serverless environments.

items.title: Adapter Validation
items.description: Verify svelte.config.js uses the correct adapter for the target environment (e.g., @sveltejs/adapter-cloudflare for Workers or @sveltejs/adapter-node for Docker).

items.title: Environment Variable Isolation
items.description: Ensure all sensitive keys (Stripe secrets, DB strings) are imported from $env/static/private or $env/dynamic/private and never exposed in client-side code.

items.title: CSRF Origin Check
items.description: Set the ORIGIN environment variable on Node-based adapters to match the production domain to prevent cross-site request forgery.

items.title: Node Engine Specification
items.description: Define the engine version in package.json to match the deployment runtime (e.g., node: '>=20.0.0') to avoid runtime syntax errors.

items.title: Edge Runtime Compatibility
items.description: If using Cloudflare or Vercel Edge, verify that no Node-specific built-ins (fs, path, crypto) are used in server load functions.

items.title: Progressive Enhancement
items.description: Apply use:enhance to all <form> elements to ensure functionality when JavaScript is disabled or failing to load.

items.title: Server-side Validation
items.description: Validate request.formData() using a schema library like Zod inside server actions before processing data.

items.title: Action Failure Handling
items.description: Use the fail() helper to return 4xx status codes and validation errors instead of throwing generic 500 errors.

items.title: Database Connection Pooling
items.description: Configure Drizzle or your ORM to use a connection pooler (like PgBouncer) to prevent connection exhaustion in serverless environments.

items.title: Streaming Slow Data
items.description: Return nested promises in load functions to stream non-critical data, preventing slow API calls from blocking the initial page paint.

items.title: Rune Migration
items.description: Replace component-level writable stores with $state() runes to utilize the more efficient fine-grained reactivity system.

items.title: Strict Prop Typing
items.description: Define all component inputs using the $props() rune with TypeScript interfaces for compile-time safety.

items.title: Effect Cleanup Logic
items.description: Verify that all $effect() runes that initialize external listeners or timers return a cleanup function to prevent memory leaks.

items.title: Derived Logic Optimization
items.description: Use $derived() or $derived.by() for computed values to ensure they are only recalculated when their dependencies change.

items.title: Snippet Refactoring
items.description: Convert repeated HTML patterns into @render snippets to reduce component overhead and improve maintainability.

items.title: Lucia Session Lifecycle
items.description: Implement session validation in the handle hook to ensure user state is globally accessible via event.locals.

items.title: Cookie Security Flags
items.description: Ensure session cookies are configured with secure: true, httpOnly: true, and sameSite: 'lax' in production.

items.title: Content Security Policy
items.description: Enable and configure the csp object in svelte.config.js to restrict script sources and prevent XSS attacks.

items.title: Rate Limiting
items.description: Apply rate-limiting logic to sensitive routes like /login or AI-generation endpoints using a Redis-based middleware.

items.title: Input Sanitization
items.description: Manually sanitize any user-provided string that is rendered using the {@html} tag to prevent script injection.

items.title: Static Pre-rendering
items.description: Export const prerender = true for all routes that do not contain user-specific data to serve them via CDN.

items.title: Image Optimization
items.description: Use a specialized image component or Vite plugin to serve WebP/AVIF formats and prevent layout shifts with fixed aspect ratios.

items.title: Font Preloading
items.description: Add <link rel="preload"> tags in app.html for critical brand fonts to minimize Flash of Unstyled Text (FOUT).

items.title: Cache-Control Headers
items.description: Set appropriate setHeaders() in server load functions for public assets to leverage browser and edge caching.

items.title: Bundle Analysis
items.description: Run vite-bundle-visualizer and remove any large libraries that can be replaced with native browser APIs or smaller alternatives.

items.title: Dynamic Meta Tags
items.description: Implement a <svelte:head> block in +layout.svelte or +page.svelte that pulls title and description from the load function data.

items.title: Canonical URL Implementation
items.description: Ensure every page renders a <link rel="canonical"> tag based on the current page URL to avoid duplicate content penalties.

items.title: Sitemap Generation
items.description: Configure an endpoint at /sitemap.xml that dynamically lists all crawlable routes using a library like super-sitemap.

items.title: Error Tracking Integration
items.description: Initialize Sentry or a similar service in hooks.server.ts and hooks.client.ts to capture runtime exceptions.

items.title: Robots.txt Presence
items.description: Verify that static/robots.txt exists and correctly points to the sitemap URL.
